name: Vanilla Dream Cone
description: Smooth and creamy vanilla ice cream made with real vanilla extract, served in a waffle cone.

name: Chocolate Heaven Cone
description: Rich chocolate ice cream with a deep cocoa flavor, made for true chocolate lovers.

name: Strawberry Bliss Cone
description: Creamy strawberry ice cream in a crispy golden cone, refreshing taste.

name: Mint Chocolate Chip Cone
description: Fresh mint ice cream mixed with crunchy chocolate chips for a cool, sweet balance.

name: Salted Caramel Banana Split
description: Classic banana split topped with  whipped cream, a warm caramel drizzle and a little sweet cherry.

name: Cookies & Cream Milkshake
description: Thick milkshake blended with vanilla ice cream and crushed chocolate cookies.

name: Mango Sorbet Cup
description: Light and refreshing mango sorbet made with ripe tropical mangoes.

name: Pistachio Sundae
description: Creamy pistachio ice cream topped with whipped cream, roasted nuts and a soft caramel topping.

name: Peanut Butter Pup Cone
description: Dog-friendly frozen peanut butter treat made with safe, simple ingredients.

name: Tuna Kitty Ice Pop
description: Cat-friendly frozen tuna snack designed as a cool and tasty pet treat.
